description: Value-native map remove / update upsert (§59.7) + primitive-key literal init (§59.3). The cell inits from a primitive-key map literal ["DAL":4500, "HOU":5000] (the v1-shipped literal form). .remove("DAL") drops the key (a key-miss getOr then yields the -1 fallback); .update("HOU", fn) upserts on a PRESENT key (5000->5100); .update("SAT", fn) upserts on an ABSENT key (fn receives not, ??0 -> 1). Net size stays 2 (removed DAL, added SAT). Observed via impl-neutral derived scalars + DOM.
rationale: §59.3 a primitive-key map literal ships in v1; §59.7 .remove returns a new map without k, .update returns a new map with k->fn(currentOrNot) (the upsert form; fn receives the current value or not). remove DAL + bump HOU + add SAT -> {HOU:5100, SAT:1}, size 2, DAL absent (getOr -1).
